text:
A long old man had lived alone far away.

You wanted to visit him.

You liked cats. I liked cats. I mean big cats. Big cats living outside.

You wanted to visit him.

They weren nice cats.

Oh yes.

They couldn't say big cat.

They just said cats.

You wouldn't hate birds.

You always liked birds.



Anyway. Something happened.


Something awful.

Something nasty.

Something... beautiful.


A bird flew right into his brains.



Talks funny!

There big birds...

Oh my god!

Oh my god... birds...

Oh baby...

Oh shit...

You... you lovebirds?!

You lovebirds?!

Oh God...

Oh my lovely birds*

 birds**

*They weren*

*squawks*Oh...oh birds.

You love birds.

*awk*You think you birds talk?

Oh my birds*Oh*Oh my birds*Oh*Oh my birds*Oh*Oh*Oh my delightful birds*Something*birds**

*birds*You birds
